clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within anterior insula, anterior cingulate, and amygdala pathways, reflecting a macro-level functional axis driving general physiological arousal, valence, and emotional processing.

These terms map onto ventral striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitries, representing the overarching cognitive computation of motivational drive, stimulus appraisal, and goal-directed behavioral selection.
Anchored in the default mode network, this axis binds together internally directed processing, integrating autobiographical memory with the complex representation of the self and conspecifics.
